title: fix(auth): set Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy for Firebase popup sign-in
rationale: tiny fix, no linked issue — pipeline sanity check
body:
## Summary
Set `Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin-allow-popups` so Firebase `signInWithPopup` can complete its redirect chain (sandbox → firebaseapp.com → accounts.google.com → back) without Chromium severing the `window.opener` relationship.

## Root cause
The prior "fix" in PR #720 set `crossOriginOpenerPolicy: false` (omit the header). Modern Chromium (119+) still severs the opener between context groups when the header is absent, causing:
1. `Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy policy would block window.close()` console warning
2. The popup's `postMessage` never reaches the parent frame
3. Subsequent API calls fail with 401 (stale/expired token — the popup flow never delivered a fresh credential)

## Fix
One-line change in `server/index.ts`: `crossOriginOpenerPolicy: false` → `{ policy: 'same-origin-allow-popups' }`. This is the documented value from [Firebase redirect best practices](https://firebase.google.com/docs/auth/web/redirect-best-practices).

## Test plan
- [ ] `curl -sI https://sandbox.aictrl.dev | grep -i cross-origin-opener-policy` returns `same-origin-allow-popups` after deploy
- [ ] Manual sign-in on sandbox.aictrl.dev via Google popup completes without COOP warning
- [ ] No 401 errors after fresh sign-in
diff:
diff --git a/server/index.ts b/server/index.ts
index b981b2e9..3d7b8c1c 100644
--- a/server/index.ts
+++ b/server/index.ts
@@ -187,7 +187,12 @@ app.use(helmet({
   noSniff: true,
   referrerPolicy: { policy: 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin' },
   crossOriginEmbedderPolicy: false, // Allow cross-origin images
-  crossOriginOpenerPolicy: false, // Required for Firebase signInWithPopup (popup is on firebaseapp.com)
+  // Firebase signInWithPopup needs the parent to keep its opener relationship
+  // when the popup navigates to firebaseapp.com → accounts.google.com → back.
+  // `false` (no header) leaves modern Chromium to sever the opener anyway, so
+  // the popup's postMessage never reaches us. `same-origin-allow-popups` is the
+  // documented value: https://firebase.google.com/docs/auth/web/redirect-best-practices
+  crossOriginOpenerPolicy: { policy: 'same-origin-allow-popups' },
 }));
 
 // Register git providers (GitHub, Bitbucket) so getProvider() works
